ch1_start.text: The descent to Nereus Station was rough. The bathysphere groaned under the immense pressure of the abyss. You are an auditor sent by Corporate to investigate the 'anomalies'. As the airlock cycles with a heavy hiss, you step onto the damp steel grating. A burly man in grease-stained overalls approaches.
ch1_start.speaker: Miller

choices.text: Shake his hand. 'Good to finally be here. I'm the auditor.'
Ignore his hand. 'Just point me to my quarters. I have work to do.'

ch1_miller_friendly.text: 'Welcome to the bottom of the world, kid. I'm Miller, Chief Mechanic.' He chuckles, but you notice a slight tremor in his hand. 'Corporate really sent you down here just for some missing rations?'
ch1_miller_friendly.speaker: Miller

choices.text: 'That, and the drill team going dark for 12 hours.'

ch1_miller_cold.text: Miller drops his hand with a sigh. 'Right to business, huh? Corporate really knows how to pick 'em. I'm Miller, Chief Mechanic. Don't break anything I have to fix.'
ch1_miller_cold.speaker: Miller

choices.text: 'Just tell me why the drill team has been dark for 12 hours.'

ch1_miller_tense.text: Miller's jaw tightens. 'Comms are spotty down there. Magnetic interference. They're fine. Look, I gotta get back to the pumps.' Before he leaves, you notice strange, luminescent mud caked on his boots.
ch1_miller_tense.speaker: Miller

choices.text: Ask him about the glowing mud.
Examine the mud secretly when he turns away.
Ignore it and head to your quarters.

ch1_mud_ask.text: 'What's that on your boots?' you ask. Miller looks down, startled. 'Just... algae from the external filters. Don't worry about it.' He walks away quickly.

ch1_mud_examine.text: You kneel down as he turns to open a bulkhead. You scrape a tiny bit of the glowing mud into a sample vial. It pulses faintly with a sickly green light. It feels... warm.

choices.text: Pocket the vial. (Gain Clue: Glowing Mud)

ch1_end.text: You head to your quarters, the unease settling in your stomach. The station groans—a deep, metallic wail that vibrates through your boots. Nereus Station is hiding something.
